notes: Student says 'Jupiter is made of rock' (factual error), receives correction, then self-corrects and adds a second entity to reach mastery.
name: planets: factual error → self-correction → mastery
promptInput: What are planets made of? Give examples.
successCriteria: States that planets are made of different materials.
Names at least two specific planets.
Describes what each named planet is made of.

transcript.message: Not quite — Jupiter is made of gas.
oh okay Jupiter is made of gas and Earth is made of rock
